revision.text:
[[ja:伊邪那岐神社 (上牧町)]] {{Expand Japanese|伊邪那岐神社 (上牧町)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Izanagi Shrine (Kanmaki) | native_name = 伊邪那岐神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Izanagi Shrine (Kanmaki) | coordinates = {{coord|34.574951|135.707052}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Izanagi|lt=Izanagi|ar|إزاناغي|az|İzanaqi|bcl|Izanagi|bn|ইজানাগি|bs|Izanagi|ca|Izanagi|cs|Izanagi a Izanami|da|Izanagi|el|Ιζανάγκι|en|Izanagi|eo|Izanagi|es|Izanagi|fa|ایزاناگی|fi|Izanaki|fr|Izanagi|he|איזאנגי|hr|Izanagi|hu|Izanagi|id|Izanagi|it|Izanagi|ja|イザナギ|ka|იძანაგი|ko|이자나기|lt|Idzanagis|mk|Изанаги|mni|ꯏꯓꯥꯅꯥꯒꯤ|no|Izanagi|or|ଇଜାନାଗି|pt|Izanagi|ro|Izanagi|ru|Идзанаги|simple|Izanagi|sk|Izanagi|sl|Izanagi|sr|Изанаки|sv|Izanagi|ta|இசநாகி|th|อิซานางิ|tl|Izanagi|tr|İzanagi|uk|Ідзанаґі|vi|Izanagi|zh|伊邪那岐|qid=Q813858|1=Izanagi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Izanagi Shrine'''|伊邪那岐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kanpei-sha|lt=Kanpei-sha|simple|Kanpei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11433427|ltq=Q11433427|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} ** Series ordinal: 74 ** P155: {{ill|Q135038957|ltq=Q135038957|qid=Q135038957|1=Shitsumino Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Taimayamaguchi Shrine|lt=Taimayamaguchi Shrine|ja|當麻山口神社|qid=Q135038958|1=Taimayamaguchi Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q1203559|ltq=Q1203559|qid=Q1203559|1=Kanmaki, Nara}} * {{ill|Q907495|ltq=Q907495|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}} * {{ill|Katsuge district|lt=Katsuge district|ja|葛下郡|zh|葛下郡|qid=Q11620862|1=Katsuge district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.574951|135.707052}} == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Izanagi|lt=Izanagi|ar|إزاناغي|az|İzanaqi|bcl|Izanagi|bn|ইজানাগি|bs|Izanagi|ca|Izanagi|cs|Izanagi a Izanami|da|Izanagi|el|Ιζανάγκι|en|Izanagi|eo|Izanagi|es|Izanagi|fa|ایزاناگی|fi|Izanaki|fr|Izanagi|he|איזאנגי|hr|Izanagi|hu|Izanagi|id|Izanagi|it|Izanagi|ja|イザナギ|ka|იძანაგი|ko|이자나기|lt|Idzanagis|mk|Изанаги|mni|ꯏꯓꯥꯅꯥꯒꯤ|no|Izanagi|or|ଇଜାନାଗି|pt|Izanagi|ro|Izanagi|ru|Идзанаги|simple|Izanagi|sk|Izanagi|sl|Izanagi|sr|Изанаки|sv|Izanagi|ta|இசநாகி|th|อิซานางิ|tl|Izanagi|tr|İzanagi|uk|Ідзанаґі|vi|Izanagi|zh|伊邪那岐|qid=Q813858|1=Izanagi}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 180733 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917284|ltq=Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 2150005005671 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県北葛城郡上牧町下牧512', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:伊邪那岐神社 (上牧町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11380920}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Izanagi Shrine |Image = {{Image wanted|cat=Kitakatsuragi District}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|qid=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}{{ill|lt=Kanmaki Town|Q1203559|qid=Q1203559|1=Kanmaki, Nara}} Shimomaki 512 |Coordinates = {{Coord|34|34|29.7|N|135|42|25.6|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi|qid=Q813858}} |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor) · former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded = |Main hall = One-bay shrine {{ill|lt=Nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |Alternate name = |Annual festivals = Summer festival: {{ill|lt=July 16|Q2731|qid=Q2731|1=July 16}}
Autumn festival: {{ill|lt=October 16|Q2963|qid=Q2963|1=October 16}} |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Izanagi
Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|float=center|caption=|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} [[File:Stone pagoda of Izanagi Shrine.jpg|Thumbnail|There are several items inscribed with Edo-period era names.]] '''Izanagi Shrine''' (いざなぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|qid=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kanmaki Town|Q1203559|qid=Q1203559|1=Kanmaki, Nara}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|qid=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. It is situated at the southern edge of the {{ill|lt=Kataoka Castle|Q11569697|qid=Q11569697|lt=Kataoka Castle ruins|1=Kataoka Castle ruins}}. === Enshrined deities === {{ill|lt=Izanagi|Q813858|qid=Q813858|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi}} is enshrined as the principal deity, with {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane|qid=Q2564508}} ({{ill|lt=Kasuga deity|Q11088805|qid=Q11088805|1=Kasuga-no-Kami}}), {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} ({{ill|lt=Hachiman deity|Q261637|qid=Q261637|1=Hachiman}}), the {{ill|lt=Sumiyoshi Three Deities|Q1114013|qid=Q1114013|lt=Sumiyoshi Sanjin|1=Sumiyoshi sanjin}}, and {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|1=Ukanomitama}} ({{ill|lt=Inari deity|Q719665|qid=Q719665|1=Inari Ōkami}}) enshrined jointly. === History === The date of foundation is unknown. The earliest documentary reference appears in the {{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|qid=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}, under the entry for the 27th day of the first month of {{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|qid=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} 1 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|qid=Q23897|1=859}}), which records the granting of the Junior Fifth Rank Upper Grade {{ill|lt=divine rank|Q11591025|qid=Q11591025|1=Shinkai (divine rank)}}. In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, it is listed as “{{ill|lt=Yamato Province|Q907495|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}} {{ill|lt=Katsushimo District|Q11620862|qid=Q11620862|1=Katsuge district}} Izanagi Shrine” and is classified as a minor shrine. It is said that the shrine was originally located on Oshiyama to the east, but was moved to its present site as a {{ill|lt=guardian deity|Q131278957|qid=Q131278957|1=Guardian deities}} when {{ill|lt=Kataoka Castle|Q11569697|qid=Q11569697|1=Kataoka Castle}} was constructed. Until the Edo period, it was known as '''Gosha Myōjin''' (the Shrine of the Five Deities). In Meiji 7 ({{ill|lt=1875|Q7764|qid=Q7764|1=1875}}), it was ranked as a village shrine, and in Meiji 40 ({{ill|lt=1907|Q2048|qid=Q2048|1=1907}}), it was designated a shrine receiving offerings of sacred food and ritual implements. === Access === * 15-minute walk from {{ill|lt=Hata Station|Q3655902|qid=Q3655902|1=Hatakeda Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|qid=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} of {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|qid=Q502125|lt=JR West|1=West Japan Railway Company}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto sidebar}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Izanagi Shrine (Kanmaki)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Izanagi Shrine (Kanmaki)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Izanagi Shrine (Kanmaki)]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:上牧町の建築物]] [[Category:上牧町の歴史]]
